name: leetcode-workflow
description: Track your LeetCode practice in git — scaffold problems, time solves, classify patterns, surface what to retry.

plugins.name: leetcode-workflow
plugins.description: Bundled toolkit of seven skills (init, new, pick, done, retry, abort, update) that turn a git repo into a LeetCode practice journal. SQLite is the source of truth; Markdown views are regenerated on every command.
